title: eulophia angornensis
intro: Eulophia angornensis, also known as the Angora orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Eulophia angornensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
